name: Gordon's Marinated Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 1/4 lb Boneless Chicken Breast, cut into 1 inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken into 1 inch pieces. Combine gin, fresh lime juice, olive oil, salt, and pepper in a bowl. Marinate the chicken overnight.
2. Thread the marinated chicken onto skewers. This recipe yields approximately 30-40 pieces.
3. In a large frying pan, add a little oil over medium heat. Cook the chicken on skewers until lightly browned, about 4-5 minutes per side. Add the remaining marinade ingredients and simmer for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until fully cooked. Stir in a dash of Tabasco.
4. Serve immediately, garnished with fresh chopped cilantro.
